initialRun.command: Push-Location client; npx playwright test data-warehouse-analytics.spec.ts data-warehouse-analytics-mock-states.spec.ts data-warehouse-analytics-crud.spec.ts --reporter=line; Pop-Location
initialRun.rootCause: FLOW-13 page is role-aware and defaults anonymous users to the analytics-unavailable branch; stale specs expected tenant-admin raw panel without setting role.

changes: P1 and default mock-state specs now navigate with role=tenant-admin and assert analytics-admin-view.
CRUD spec now opens the platform-only raw index panel explicitly before asserting raw CRUD controls.
CRUD spec uses project-unique record names to prevent cross-project strict-mode collisions.
CRUD spec waits for either list or empty-state after async raw-index reload.
All three specs write project-specific screenshot filenames to preserve desktop/tablet/mobile evidence.

focusedCrudRerun.command: Push-Location client; $env:VITE_PORT='5174'; npx playwright test data-warehouse-analytics-crud.spec.ts --reporter=line; Pop-Location

fullPlaywright.command: Push-Location client; $env:VITE_PORT='5174'; npx playwright test data-warehouse-analytics.spec.ts data-warehouse-analytics-mock-states.spec.ts data-warehouse-analytics-crud.spec.ts --reporter=line; Pop-Location

clientTypecheck.command: Push-Location client; npx tsc --noEmit --pretty false; Pop-Location

pngEvidence.repoEvidenceNote: FLOW-13 cascade-specific GitHub repo screenshots are pending the fork cascade phases; global repo-evidence screenshots are present.
